meta.title: Stoa Dark Immersion Loop
meta.notes: Veo exports 16:9 — crop center band in CSS via object-cover on wide section

scene.description: Deep navy void with flowing indigo and coral signal trails moving through depth like underwater light currents.

render_prompt: 10 second seamless cinematic loop, 16:9. Dark navy (#0E1018) abstract signal trails flow in true 3D depth — indigo and coral light currents with parallax layers. NOT panning a still image. No HUD, no text. CURA-style cinematic immersion. Loopable.
